summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Reco/Final Qty column visibility feature. All 17 frontend tests and 14 backend tests PASSED. Individual session reports correctly hide Reco/Final Qty columns. Consolidated ('All Sessions') reports correctly show Reco and Final Qty columns.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend returns reco_qty/final_qty fields even for individual sessions (with 0/physical_qty values). The frontend correctly hides these based on isConsolidated prop. This is acceptable but could optionally be optimized to not return those fields for individual sessions.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data (Reliance Retail client, Q1 2026 sessions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reco/Final Qty visibility feature fully tested and working. Backend uses EMPTY_RECO_MAPS for individual session endpoints and _build_reco_maps(client_id) for consolidated endpoints. Frontend uses isConsolidated prop to conditionally render Reco/Final Qty columns. All table components (BinWiseTable, DetailedTable, BarcodeWiseTable, ArticleWiseTable, CategorySummaryTable) and Summary Cards correctly implement the visibility logic.

individual_session_tests.bin_wise_no_reco_adj_card: PASS - No Reco Adj summary card
individual_session_tests.bin_wise_no_final_qty_card: PASS - No Final Qty summary card

consolidated_view_tests.bin_wise_has_final_qty_card: PASS - Has Final Qty summary card

features_verified.individual_session_summary_cards: NO Reco Adj/Final Qty cards - PASS
features_verified.consolidated_detailed: HAS Reco and Final Qty columns - PASS
features_verified.consolidated_barcode_wise: HAS Reco and Final Qty columns - PASS
features_verified.consolidated_article_wise: HAS Reco and Final Qty columns (per previous iteration)
features_verified.backend_individual_returns_reco_0: PASS - Individual endpoints return reco_qty=0, final_qty=physical_qty
